# This file is auto-generated by Doriax Editor. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)
project(ProjectLib)

set(PROJECT_ROOT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
set(INTERNAL_DIR ${PROJECT_ROOT}/.doriax)

# Specify C++ standard
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# Build mode: when ON, build as Doriax Editor plugin (shared library)
option(DORIAX_EDITOR_PLUGIN "Build as Doriax Editor plugin" OFF)
if(DORIAX_EDITOR_PLUGIN)
    add_compile_definitions(DORIAX_EDITOR_PLUGIN)
endif()

if (NOT DORIAX_EDITOR_PLUGIN)
    add_definitions("-DDEFAULT_WINDOW_WIDTH=960")
    add_definitions("-DDEFAULT_WINDOW_HEIGHT=540")

    set(COMPILE_ZLIB OFF)
    set(IS_ARM OFF)

    add_definitions("-DSOKOL_GLCORE")
    add_definitions("-DWITH_MINIAUDIO") # For SoLoud

    list(APPEND PLATFORM_SOURCE
        ${INTERNAL_DIR}/generated/PlatformEditor.cpp
        ${INTERNAL_DIR}/generated/main.cpp
    )

    if(WIN32)
        list(APPEND PLATFORM_LIBS opengl32 gdi32 user32 shell32 glfw)
    elseif(APPLE)
        list(APPEND PLATFORM_LIBS glfw "-framework OpenGL" "-framework Cocoa" "-framework IOKit" "-framework CoreVideo" "-framework CoreFoundation")
    else()
        list(APPEND PLATFORM_LIBS GL dl m glfw)
    endif()
endif() 

set(SCRIPT_SOURCES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/IcePee.cpp
)

set(FACTORY_SOURCES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/generated/New_Scene.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/generated/New_Scene_2.cpp
)

set(PROJECT_SOURCE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/scene_scripts.cpp)

# Project target
if(NOT CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Android" AND NOT DORIAX_EDITOR_PLUGIN)
    add_executable(projectlib
        ${PROJECT_SOURCE}
        ${SCRIPT_SOURCES}
        ${PLATFORM_SOURCE}
    )
else()
    add_library(projectlib SHARED
        ${PROJECT_SOURCE}
        ${SCRIPT_SOURCES}
        ${PLATFORM_SOURCE}
    )
endif()

# When building outside the editor, also compile Factory-generated sources
if(NOT DORIAX_EDITOR_PLUGIN)
    target_sources(projectlib PRIVATE ${FACTORY_SOURCES})
endif()

# To suppress warnings if not Debug
if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "Debug")
    set(DORIAX_LIB_SYSTEM SYSTEM)
endif()

target_include_directories(projectlib ${DORIAX_LIB_SYSTEM} PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}

    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/libs/sokol
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/libs/box2d/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/libs/joltphysics
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/renders
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/action
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/buffer
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/component
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/ecs
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/io
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/manager
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/math
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/object
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/object/sound
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/object/ui
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/object/environment
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/object/physics
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/pool
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/registry
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/render
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/script
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/shader
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/subsystem
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/texture
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.doriax/engine-api/core/util
)

# Default DORIAX_LIB_DIR if not provided
if(NOT DEFINED DORIAX_LIB_DIR OR DORIAX_LIB_DIR STREQUAL "")
    set(DORIAX_LIB_DIR "/home/eduardo/Development/doriax/build")
    # Must be the same as the editor's library to not ODR violation / ABI mismatch
    add_compile_definitions(DORIAX_EDITOR)
endif()

# Find doriax library in specified location
find_library(DORIAX_LIB doriax PATHS ${DORIAX_LIB_DIR} NO_DEFAULT_PATH)
if(NOT DORIAX_LIB)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Doriax library not found in ${DORIAX_LIB_DIR}")
endif()

target_link_libraries(projectlib PRIVATE ${DORIAX_LIB} ${PLATFORM_LIBS})

# Set compile options based on compiler and platform
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(projectlib PRIVATE /W4 /EHsc)
else()
    target_compile_options(projectlib PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra -fPIC)
    target_link_options(projectlib PRIVATE -Wl,-z,defs,--no-undefined)
endif()

# Set properties for the shared library
set_target_properties(projectlib PROPERTIES
    RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_DEBUG ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_RELEASE ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_RELWITHDEBINFO ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_MINSIZEREL ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_DEBUG ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_RELEASE ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_RELWITHDEBINFO ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_MINSIZEREL ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    OUTPUT_NAME "projectlib"
    PREFIX ""
)
